summary: BlendLink critical fixes testing completed successfully. LIVE Stripe keys verified working for subscriptions and BL Coins checkout (cs_live_* URLs). WebSocket endpoint path corrected to /api/admin-realtime/ws. Push notification service integrated. Route conflict identified between /listings/my and /listings/{listing_id}.

minor.issue: Route conflict - '/listings/my' is shadowed by '/listings/{listing_id}' in server.py. The 'my' is interpreted as a listing_id returning 404
minor.root_cause: server.py (line 1396) has @marketplace_router.get('/listings/{listing_id}') which matches before marketplace_routes.py's @marketplace_router.get('/listings/my')
minor.fix_suggestion: Reorder routes so /listings/my comes before /listings/{listing_id}, or use unique route prefix like /my-listings

minor.issue: WebSocket real-time metrics showing 'unavailable' in admin dashboard despite endpoint existing
minor.notes: Admin panel fully functional without real-time metrics. May need frontend connection retry logic

subscription_checkout.details: Subscription checkout generates cs_live_* URLs - verified Bronze tier redirects to checkout.stripe.com with LIVE mode session

bl_coins_checkout.details: BL Coins purchase checkout generates cs_live_* URLs - verified via API test

new_path.details: WebSocket endpoint exists at corrected path

subscriptions_page.details: All 4 membership tiers displayed with correct pricing: Bronze $4.99, Silver $9.99, Gold $14.99, Diamond $29.99

wallet_page.details: Wallet page loads correctly showing BL Coins balance (100B+), account stats, team commissions section

admin_panel.details: Admin login works, dashboard loads with stats (116 users, 14 posts, 57 listings, 100B+ BL coins)

push_notifications.details: Push notification routes exist (/api/push/*), service integrated with payment events

action_items: FIX ROUTE CONFLICT: Reorder /listings/my before /listings/{listing_id} in server.py or use different route prefix
OPTIONAL: Debug admin WebSocket real-time metrics connection for live dashboard updates
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering issue in server.py: Dynamic route /listings/{listing_id} (line 1396) shadows static route /listings/my in marketplace_routes.py
Dual marketplace_router registration: server.py (line 2718) and marketplace_routes.py (line 2982) both register marketplace routers causing potential conflicts
context_for_next_testing_agent: LIVE Stripe mode verified working with cs_live_* sessions. Route conflict exists at /listings/my due to route ordering. Admin WebSocket endpoint at /api/admin-realtime/ws is correct but real-time metrics showing unavailable in UI. All core payment flows working correctly with LIVE Stripe keys.
